stats.l: Hausdorff dim of the divergence-candidate set

bullets: Overnight three-model session: ~20 proof mechanisms tested, all killed with documented causes; sign dichotomy, carry theorem, mod-3 slaving now certified in Lean 4
Two open subproblems posed: coding-map regularity (standalone) and bounded-gap script elimination
Consensus: not a proof — a rigorously delimited structural map of why Collatz resists current methods
